basic_details.job_title: Indian Army SSC Tech 68th Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Army has released the official notification for the 68th Short Service Commission (Technical) Entry for Men and Women, offering a prestigious opportunity for engineering graduates to join the Indian Army as Commissioned Officers. The online application process will be conducted through the official Join Indian Army portal, and selection will be based on shortlisting + SSB interview + medical examination. This entry is one of the most sought-after defence recruitment drives for engineering aspirants.

important_dates.raw: SSC Tech Women Application Start Date: 08 July 2026 SSC Tech Men Application Start Date: 09 July 2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 06–07 August 2026 Course Commencement: April 2027

how_to_apply: Register using email ID and mobile number
Fill the SSC Tech application form carefully
Submit application and take printout for reference

content_sections.heading: Indian Army SSC Tech Recruitment 2026 Overview
Important Dates
content_sections.text: SSC Tech Women Application Start Date: 08 July 2026 SSC Tech Men Application Start Date: 09 July 2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 06–07 August 2026 Course Commencement: April 2027

content_sections.heading: Indian Army SSC Tech Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: The SSC Tech Entry offers direct officer recruitment for engineering graduates across multiple technical streams: Civil Engineering Mechanical Engineering Electrical Engineering Computer Science / IT Electronics & Communication Other Eligible Engineering Streams Both male and female candidates are eligible for different SSC Tech courses as per the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for SSC Tech 2026?
content_sections.text: B.E / B.Tech degree holders in relevant engineering disciplines Final year engineering students eligible (subject to conditions) Age between 20 to 27 years (approx.) Only unmarried male and female candidates (as per rules) Indian citizens fulfilling medical and physical standards

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Indian Army SSC Tech Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit official website joinindianarmy.nic.in Click on “Officer Entry Apply/Login” Register using email ID and mobile number Fill the SSC Tech application form carefully Upload required documents and photograph Submit application and take printout for reference

content_sections.heading: Indian Army 68th Short Service Commission (Tech) Entry - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is Indian Army SSC Tech Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a Short Service Commission Technical entry for engineering graduates to join the Indian Army as officers.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for SSC Tech 68th Course?
faq.answer: Candidates who have completed B.E / B.Tech in relevant engineering streams can apply.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any written exam for SSC Tech entry?
faq.answer: No, there is no written exam. Selection is based on shortlisting and SSB interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for SSC Tech Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications, SSB interview, and medical examination.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for SSC Tech 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is generally 20 to 27 years, as per official notification rules.
